title: Pause Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub Pause ()

Note

The function executed by Call method cannot be stopped/paused by Stop, Pause, Halt, or Quit method.

If you need to stop or pause, use Xqt Method.
description: Causes all normal SPEL+ tasks in the Controller to pause.  If the robot is moving, it will immediately decelerate to a stop.
see_also:
Continue

EventReceived

Stop

Pause Example

VB
examples:
Sub btnPause_Click()_
       ByVal sender As System.Object, _
       ByVal e As System.EventArgs) _
       Handles btnPause.Click
    m_spel.Pause ()

btnPause.Enabled = False
    btnContinue.Enabled = True
End Sub
